# zig-keychain

> Cross-platform keychain/secrets abstraction in Zig with C FFI -- macOS Keychain (SecItem) and Linux Secret Service (libsecret).

Published docs: https://transscendsurvival.org/zig-keychain/. License: Zlib OR MIT.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-keychain/blob/main/README.md): Overview, architecture, platform support, C and Zig API reference
- [Documentation](https://transscendsurvival.org/zig-keychain/): MkDocs site
- [Apple interop](https://transscendsurvival.org/zig-keychain/guides/apple-interop/): Swift/ObjC parity and gaps
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-keychain/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Installation, development setup, code style
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-keychain/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Agent-oriented project summary
- [C Header](https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-keychain/blob/main/include/zig_keychain.h): Full C API declarations
- [Full API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Jesssullivan/zig-keychain/main/llms-full.txt): Complete function-level reference for LLMs

## API Overview

4 C FFI functions in `zig_keychain.h`:

- `zig_keychain_store` -- store a secret (upsert semantics)
- `zig_keychain_lookup` -- retrieve a secret by service+account
- `zig_keychain_delete` -- remove a secret by service+account
- `zig_keychain_search` -- find items matching an account name

## Platforms

- macOS: Security.framework (SecItem)
- Linux: libsecret (D-Bus Secret Service)

## Apple Interop Scope

zig-keychain replaces a narrow generic-password keychain call site, not
SwiftUI, AppKit, UIKit, Cocoa, iCloud Keychain, Secure Enclave,
LocalAuthentication, access groups, synchronizable items, certificates,
or private-key identity APIs. Current Swift/ObjC gaps include
SwiftPM/modulemap packaging, ObjC examples, nullability annotations,
Swift wrappers, and migration examples.
